DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. ON NOVEMBER 5, 2014, THE COURT ISSUED A MINUTE ORDER INSTRUCTING PLAINTIFF TO DELIVER A COURTESY COPY OF HIS OPPOSITION TO DEPT. 302 IN COMPLIANCE WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE MINUTE ORDER WARNED PLAINTIFF THAT FAILURE TO DO SO WOULD RESULT IN THE MOTION BEING GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT COMPLIED WITH THE MINUTE ORDER OR LOCAL RULE 2.6B. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: DENISE DOUCETTE, CSR # 5963 (302/EHG)

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 26, 2014 TO GIVE OPPOSING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. OPPOSING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 5, 2014 AT 4:00 P.M. OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 56767119)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2014 Continued To Feb-25-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-26-2014 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. On November 5, 2014, the Court issued a minute order instructing Plaintiff to deliver a courtesy copy of his opposition to Dept. 302 in compliance with Local Rule 2.6B. The minute order warned Plaintiff that failure to do so would result in the motion being granted. Plaintiff has not complied with the minute order or Local Rule 2.6B. ORDER SIGNED.
Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Denise Doucette, CSR # 5963 =302/ehg

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-27-2014 Continued To Dec-24-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-05-2014 Continued To Nov-26-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to November 26, 2014 to give opposing party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Opposing party must deliver courtesy copies of the opposition papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than November 5, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be granted. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)
